summary: Frontend-only validation of the VLSI portfolio redesign. All 12 requested checks passed. Resume feature is fully removed (nav, footer, /resume route now serves the Home page). Home shows only the desired sections (hero, workstation/engineering dashboard, RV32IM showcase, Design Flow, Engineering Toolchain); the four removed sections are gone. About page renders all 6 sections with the required data-testids. Projects page uses 'OPEN PROJECT' buttons with data-testid=open-project-; clicking navigates to /projects/. ProjectDetailPage shows all 11 engineering sections, has no code snippets and no inside #project-hero, and the waveform toggle flips aria-expanded. Both /projects/rv32im-core (fallback) and /projects/rv32im-processor (DETAILED entry) render populated KEY METRICS sidebars. /portal still renders SecurePortal with the auth panel.

issues: Section heading below hero is 'ENGINEERING WORKSTATION' (System Diagnostics Deck) rather than the phrase 'Workstation Dashboard' referenced in the request. Semantically the correct component renders; only the label differs. Consider aligning the copy or the spec.

testability_gaps.issue: Nav items (HOME/ABOUT/PROJECTS/CONTACT/REQUEST ACCESS/PORTAL) render as <button> elements without data-testid="nav-link-*". The review_request explicitly mentions verifying via 'aria/text or data-testid nav-link-*'. Text-based selectors work, but adding data-testid="nav-link-home", etc., would improve automation stability.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid="nav-link-<home|about|projects|contact|request-access|portal>" to <TopNavBar> buttons for stable e2e selectors.
(Optional) Reconcile the home section heading between 'Engineering Workstation' (implemented) and 'Workstation Dashboard' (spec wording).
critical_code_review_comments: SecurePortal / Firebase / Admin flows were intentionally not modified per scope — untouched and still functional.

ProjectDetailRouter fallback to projectToDetail(base) works: both a DETAILED entry (rv32im-processor) and a non-detailed entry (rv32im-core) render the redesigned ProjectDetailPage with populated KEY METRICS.
Waveform section correctly uses aria-expanded and data-testid=toggle-waveforms; collapses/expands on click.
test_credentials: N/A (auth flow not exercised — SecurePortal only loaded to verify hero+panel render).
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is served by a single supervisor process 'app' (Vite dev on port 3000). Preview URL: https://6a6bded7-de19-4b43-80b7-873a242e6642.preview.emergentagent.com. Route slugs behave as: unknown -> home (client-side). Use case-insensitive text matching — most headings render UPPERCASE via CSS text-transform. Nav items currently lack data-testid=nav-link-* attributes; select by text (HOME/ABOUT/...) instead. Detailed engineering sections tested by direct URL — 11 section headings all present verbatim on both slugs.
